$comment: Intrinsic Foundation — company-wide tokens. Never use raw values in feature code.

typography.fontStackSans: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", "SF Pro Display", "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif
typography.fontStackDisplay: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Display", "SF Pro Text", "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif
typography.fontStackMono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

largeTitle.use: Rare full-screen hero titles; prefer navigation title for most screens

title.use: Primary screen title in content (when not using navigation bar title)

headline.use: List row primary text, card titles, emphasized inline labels

body.use: Default reading text, descriptions, form values

callout.use: Secondary emphasis blocks, callout banners, short intros

subheadline.use: List row subtitles, supporting sentences under headlines

footnote.use: Timestamps, legal hints, tertiary metadata, error fine print

caption.use: Image captions, badge text, compact list secondary lines

label.use: Section headers, form field labels, uppercase chrome — not body copy
